title: Baby Girls Toys 6-12 Months - Infant Sensory Music Animal Stuffed Caterpillar Toy with Rattle & Mirror Crinkle for Tummy Time, Newborn 0 3 6 9 12 18 Shower Gifts Soothing Companion Toys, Pink
features: 6-in-1 Developmental Sensory Toy: This baby caterpillar combines rattle, crinkle, mirror, music, plush textures, and a height ruler to stimulate auditory, tactile, and visual senses. Perfect for tummy time, it encourages fine motor skills, head lifting, and brain development while moms track growth with the built-in ruler. Ideal newborn toys 0-3 months up to 18 months for girls.

Engaging Tummy Time Companion: Bright colors, 7 high-contrast patterns, and a baby-safe mirror attract infants’ attention during play. The crinkle wings & rattle sounds promote curiosity. Adopting a new generation of music IC chip, each press accurately plays 16 seconds (activated by pressing the head) with an interval design to avoid excessive stimulation. helps calm fussy babies. A must-have developmental toy for 3-12 months boys girls to prevent flat head syndrome.

Ultra-Safe & Portable Design: Made of hypoallergenic plush and elastic cotton, this lightweight stuffed toy is free from BPA and harsh seams. Perfect for cribs, strollers, or car seats—take it anywhere as a travel-friendly soother. Machine-washable for easy cleanup, meeting ASTM F963 & CPSIA safety standards.

Multi-Sensory Learning Experience: Each segment offers unique textures (crinkle paper, squeaker, soft fabrics) and sounds to boost sensory exploration. The mirror fosters self-recognition, while gentle music aids auditory development. An excellent Montessori toy for 6-12 months to encourage independent play.

Thoughtful Gift for Every Occasion: Packaged in a luxury gift box, this caterpillar is the top choice for baby showers, birthdays, or holidays. Suitable from newborn to toddler, it’s a practical yet adorable gift praised by parents for its durability and educational value. Also great as 1st birthday gifts or christening presents.
description: From the brand Where Curiosity Meets Growth Toys Designed to Calm Little Minds, Not Just Entertain Previous page Baby Sensory Toys Montessori Rattle Bulk Developmental Benefits – Enhances cognitive skills, grip strength, auditory senses, and color recognition in early childhood Baby Carseat Toys High Contrast Black White Toys ✔ High-contrast black & white patterns – Stimulates newborn visual development ✔ Great baby shower gift – Unisex design for babies 6-in-1 Sensory Toy Ideal For: • Sensory-seeking babies (0-12M) • Montessori-inspired parenting • Pediatrician-recommended tummy time Newborn Wrist Rattles Toys Baby Music Toys Next page
